title: Compounds for use in the treatment of telomere related diseases and/or telomere related medical conditions
abstract: The invention relates to compounds for use in the treatment of telomere related diseases and/or telomere related medical conditions, particularly wherein said telomere related diseases and/or telomere related medical conditions are cancer and cellular ageing. Particularly, herein is disclosed 37 kDa/67 kDa laminin receptor precursor/ high affinity laminin receptor (LRP/LR) and/or a fragment thereof for use in the treatment and/or prevention of cellular ageing.
claims:
Claims 37 kDa/67 kDa laminin receptor precursor/ high affinity laminin receptor (LRP/LR) and/or a fragment thereof for use in the impediment of cellular senescence, wherein LRP/LR and/or the fragment thereof being for administration to a subject in need thereof. LRP/LR and/or a fragment thereof for use according to Claim 1 , wherein LRP/LR comprises a peptide/protein sequence listing as set forth in SEQ ID NO: 1 or SEQ ID NO: 2, or a fragment thereof. LRP/LR and/or a fragment thereof for use according to Claim 1 or Claim 2, wherein LRP/LR comprises a peptide/protein sequence listing having at least 80% homology to the sequences as set forth in SEQ ID NO: 1 or SEQ ID NO: 2, or a fragment thereof. LRP/LR and/or a fragment thereof for use according to any one of Claims 1 to Claim 3, wherein LRP/LR comprises a fragment of LRP/LR being a peptide/protein having a sequence as set forth in SEQ ID NO: 4 and/or SEQ ID NO: 5. 37 kDa/67 kDa laminin receptor precursor/ high affinity laminin receptor (LRP/LR) and/or a fragment thereof for use in the therapeutic treatment of at least one of the following diseases: dyskeratosis congenital, idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis, Hoyeraal-Hreiderasson syndrome, Hutchinson-Gilford progeria, aplastic anemia and age-related diseases including osteoporosis, type II diabetes, atherosclerosis and cardiovascular disease. 37 kDa/67 kDa laminin receptor precursor/ high affinity laminin receptor (LRP/LR) and/or a fragment thereof for use in non-therapeutic treatment in the prevention and/or treatment and/or impeding of muscle degeneration, loss of bone mass, skin atrophy, hair loss, graying of hair and/or a loss of immune system efficacy. LRP/LR and/or a fragment thereof for use according to Claim 5, wherein LRP/LR comprises a fragment of LRP/LR being a peptide/protein having a sequence as set forth in SEQ ID NO: 4 and/or SEQ ID NO: 5. LRP/LR and/or a fragment thereof for use according to Claim 6, wherein LRP/LR comprises a fragment of LRP/LR being a peptide/protein having a sequence as set forth in SEQ ID NO: 4 and/or SEQ ID NO: 5. LRP/LR and/or a fragment thereof for use according to any one of Claims 1 to 8, wherein the subject is a human and/or animal, and wherein the LRP/LR and/or a fragment thereof is 

 formulated into a pharmaceutical composition including a pharmaceutical carrier for parenteral or non-parenteral administration to the subject. 10. A non-therapeutic method of increasing levels of hTERT and/or increasing telomerase activity and/or increasing telomere length and/or decreasing senescent markers in a cell of a human, animal or plant subject, the method comprising the following steps: (i) transfecting the cell to produce 37 kDa/67 kDa laminin receptor precursor/ high affinity laminin receptor (LRP/LR) and/or a fragment thereof therein increasing cellular levels of LRP/LR and/or fragments thereof; or (ii) providing the cell with LRP/LR and/or fragments thereof to increase cellular levels of LRP/LR and/or fragments thereof, wherein the increased levels of hTERT and/or increased telomerase activity and/or increased telomere length and/or decreased levels of senescent markers impedes and/or treats and/or prevents senescence (cellular ageing) of the cell in the subject. 11. The method according to Claim 10, wherein LRP/LR comprises a peptide/protein sequence listing as set forth in SEQ ID NO: 1 or SEQ ID NO: 2, or a fragment thereof. 12. The method according to Claim 10 or Claim 11, wherein LRP/LR comprises a peptide/protein sequence listing having at least 80% homology to the sequences as set forth in SEQ ID NO: 1 or SEQ ID NO: 2, or a fragment thereof. 13. The method according to any one of Claims 10 to 12, wherein LRP/LR comprises a fragment of LRP/LR being a peptide/protein having a sequence as set forth in SEQ ID NO: 4 and/or SEQ ID NO: 5. 14. An anti-37 kDa/67 kDa laminin receptor precursor/ high affinity laminin receptor (anti- LRP/LR) specific antibody or fragment thereof for use in the treatment of cancer, wherein the anti-LRP/LR antibody being for administration to a subject in need thereof. 15. The anti-LRP/LR specific antibody or fragment thereof for use according to Claim 14, wherein LRP/LR comprises a peptide/protein sequence listing as set forth in SEQ ID NO: 1 or SEQ ID NO: 2, or a fragment thereof. 16. The anti-LRP/LR specific antibody or fragment thereof for use according to Claim 14 or Claim 15, wherein LRP/LR comprises a peptide/protein sequence listing having at least 80% homology to the sequences as set forth in SEQ ID NO: 1 or SEQ ID NO: 2, or a fragment thereof. 17. The anti-LRP/LR specific antibody or fragment thereof for use according to any one of Claims 14 to 16, wherein the anti-LRP/LR specific antibody or fragment thereof is at least one of the following group: F(ab')2 fragment, a Fab fragment scFv, a bi-specific scFv, a tri-specific scFv, a single chain or tandem diabody, a single domain antibody (dAb), a minibody and a molecular recognition unit (MRU). 18. The anti-LRP/LR specific antibody or fragment thereof for use according to any one of Claims 14 to 17, wherein the anti-LRP/LR specific antibody is IgGl-iS18. 19. The anti-LRP/LR specific antibody or fragment thereof for use according to any one of Claims 14 to 18, wherein the subject is a human and/or animal, and wherein the LRP/LR and/or a fragment thereof is formulated into a pharmaceutical composition including a pharmaceutical carrier for parenteral or non-parenteral administration to the subject. 20. siRNA directed against 37 kDa/67 kDa laminin receptor precursor/ high affinity laminin receptor (LRP/LR) or fragment thereof for use in the treatment of cancer, wherein the siRNA being for administration to a subject in need thereof.
